description: Use this API to remove a participating transformer control variable from a specified OPF linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn_tran(iqid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid)
python_syntax: ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn_tran(iqid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ekbus
parameters.description: Third bus number if a three-winding transformer is specified and zero for a two-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
specified branch is not a transformer.
specified branch is not a three-winding transformer.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
